---
title: "The Rev. James Beck"
---

## The Rev. James Beck

**Dates:** (b. Bengal 1819/20)

### Description

husband of Gertrude Walter’s stepmother, Rector of Parham, Sussex, and then of Bildeston, Suffolk

### Biography

He became in 1871 Rector of Parham transferring by 1881 to of Bildeston, Suffolk, and serving as Rural Dean of Suffolk.  He married (1867)  Gertrude Walter’s stepmother Caroline Jeannette (Bignell) Walter.

### Letters

- Letter from April 27 [1892[[footnote:1]]].
- Letter from Decr 27th 1889
- Letter from Aug 20th [1878 or later]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
